nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks that require personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I was really happy to have AI to help me write clean content faster

nodes.label: AI as competitive advantage
nodes.grounding_span: It makes us stand out as 'forward thinkers'

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Distrust due to AI errors or inauthenticity
nodes.grounding_span: As AI evolves, my ability to trust it will evolve

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative or personal tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really like doing administrative work

nodes.label: AI as initial draft generator
nodes.label_negative: AI for full writing without human editing
nodes.grounding_span: I like to do the proofreading and editing, myself

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: Marketing in the higher ed space needs to feel personal and authentic

nodes.label: Career sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry about this when it comes to my career

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me deliver pretty good work quickly

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: The use of AI as a beginning, middle, and end of a project is frustrating to me

nodes.label: Concern about skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry about the, 'If you don't use it, you lose it' type of thing

nodes.label: Cautious openness to future delegation
nodes.grounding_span: When I trust that AI won't make writing errors... I will likely begin to delegate more

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
Strategic differentiation through AI mastery
nodes.grounding_span: It makes us stand out as 'forward thinkers'
